disputed_language: When an account joins an organization that has an organization trail, CloudTrail adds the organization-trail copy and service-linked role to that account and starts organization-trail logging for it.
explanation: The automatic account-addition sentence is not universally true as written. AWS states that when a multi-Region organization trail uses an opt-in home Region, a member account sends no activity until that account enables the home Region. The sibling caveat claim does not make this exact artifact independently qualified.
required_action: Qualify automatic logging by the documented opt-in-home-Region condition or add that condition to this artifact?s applicability/account-configuration metadata.
suggested_revision: When an account joins an organization with an organization trail, CloudTrail adds the applicable trail copy and service-linked role and starts logging subject to the trail?s Region/opt-in conditions.

supporting_source.locator: Opt-in Region behavior (multi-Region trail with an opt-in home Region) and account-addition behavior
supporting_source.title: Creating a trail for an organization
